content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.eff.org/deeplinks/2022/12/adoption-eus-digital-services-act-landmark-year-platform-regulation-2022-year", "source_title": "The Adoption of the EU's Digital Services Act: A Landmark ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "2022 marked an important year for digital rights across the European Union as the landmark Digital Services Act (DSA) came into force on 16 ...", "direct_quote": "2022 marked an important year for digital rights across the European Union as the landmark Digital Services Act (DSA) came into force on 16 November seeking to foster a safer and more competitive digital space.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Since the DSA was first introduced by the European Commission in December 2020, EFF has fought for protections on four key areas: platform l...", "direct_quote": "Since the DSA was first introduced by the European Commission in December 2020, EFF has fought for protections on four key areas: platform liability, interoperability mandates, procedural justice, and user control.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
